typography.import_instructions: Add to main CSS or index.html: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap');

hierarchy.h1: font-outfit text-4xl sm:text-5xl tracking-tight text-zinc-900 font-medium
hierarchy.h2: font-outfit text-2xl sm:text-3xl tracking-tight text-zinc-900 font-medium
hierarchy.label: font-plex text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-zinc-500 font-semibold

layout_and_spacing.structure: Sidebar-Main Hybrid (ChatGPT style). Sidebar on left (w-64) with slightly off-white bg (zinc-50), Main content area pure white.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers. Use gap-6 or gap-8 in grids.
layout_and_spacing.radius: Use rounded-2xl for main cards/modals, rounded-xl for standard inputs, rounded-full for buttons.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid protocol for Dashboard (MODE B: Control Room Grid). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6.

component_instructions.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Primary buttons should be black (zinc-900). Secondary buttons light gray. Add smooth transition-all duration-200.
component_instructions.inputs: ChatGPT-like textareas. For 'Add Task', use a large, sticky bottom input bar with rounded-2xl, subtle shadow, and a submit icon button inside it.
component_instructions.cards: Cardless preference where possible. If cards are needed, use flat background, 1px subtle border (border-zinc-200), no heavy drop shadows. Hover states: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-sm.
component_instructions.navigation: Icon + Label in sidebar. Active state: bg-zinc-200/50 text-zinc-900 font-medium. Inactive: text-zinc-500 hover:text-zinc-900 hover:bg-zinc-100/50.
component_instructions.badges: rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium border

features_implementation.task_management: Use a chat-like input at the bottom to quickly 'prompt' a new task. Display tasks in a clean list or kanban with avatars, priority badges, and due dates.
features_implementation.knowledge_base: Masonry or bento grid of document cards. Emphasize titles and excerpts.
features_implementation.updates_feed: Minimalist vertical timeline or feed. Use the modern office image as a header for company-wide announcements.
features_implementation.role_access: Subtle UI badges to indicate user role (Admin, Manager, Member) near the profile section.

libraries_and_tools.ui_components: shadcn/ui (Button, Input, Card, Badge, Dialog, DropdownMenu, Avatar, Tabs)
libraries_and_tools.animations: framer-motion (for page transitions, tab underlines, and task list staggering)

testing.requirements: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, task items, nav links) MUST include data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case, role-based.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a sidebar layout mimicking ChatGPT (sidebar on left, main content on right).
For the task creation, build a sticky bottom input area like a chat prompt (e.g., 'Assign a task...').
Implement pure React + TailwindCSS + Shadcn without overcomplicating state management. Use context if needed.
Strictly follow the typography and color tokens defined here.
Use the provided image URLs for avatars in the task list and profile area.
